---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: project-list
    contents: 
      - "/projects/*.qmd"
    sort: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    type: table
    fields:
      - title
    categories: false
---
(to be updated soon)

## Project 1:

Here is my [first project](/projects/01-project.qmd)


## Project 2

Heres is my [second project](/projects/02-project.qmd)

consider making type default instead of table but this will display images

:::project-list
:::
